reviews.comment:
Todo normal.
Había mucha gente, mucha espera para cargar combustible, para ingresar a la tienda y en el baño de mujeres.
Debería haber más empleados en los surtidores

(Translated by Google)
Everything was normal.
There were a lot of people, and long waits to get fuel, to enter the convenience store, and in the women's restroom.
There should be more staff at the pumps.

reviews.comment:
Parada en el cruce del desierto, buena atención, los baños un poco descuidados, abarrotado de gente, y mucha cola para entrar al shopping. Los precios un asesinato a mano armada. Lo peor siempre tienen problema con ypf que no tienen sistema. Además que dos por tres se quedan sin nafta.

(Translated by Google)
Stop at the desert crossing, good service, the restrooms a bit neglected, packed with people, and a long line to get into the shopping mall. The prices are highway robbery. The worst part is they always have problems with the YPF gas station; their system is down. Plus, they run out of gas every other day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTeTV6T0tnEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre te mienten diciéndote que no tienen nafta súper para poder cargarte infinia que les deja mejores márgenes

(Translated by Google)
They always lie to you, telling you they don't have premium gasoline so they can fill you up with Infinia, which gives them better profit margins.
